hero_subtitle: Three specialized firms — MAS Corporation for e-procurement, MAS Communication for web & IT, and MAS Consultancy for foreign business operations. One group, complete solutions.
about_text: MAS is a licensed group of companies under MAS Corporation, headquartered in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Since 2014, the MAS Group has been the trusted partner for US and international businesses seeking excellence in e-procurement, digital transformation, and Bangladesh market entry.
about_text2: Our three sister concerns operate in dedicated domains: MAS Corporation leads government and corporate e-procurement, MAS Communication delivers full-stack web development and IT solutions, and MAS Consultancy provides end-to-end operational support for US businesses expanding into Bangladesh.
contact_address: House 12, Road 4, Block B, Banani, Dhaka-1213, Bangladesh
